full_text:
Ding Chong 丁沖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Chong (丁沖). Early advisor to Cao Cao and Yang Feng, he died of overdrinking. Ding Chong was affiliated with Yang Feng and the Wei Kingdom.
